an1.209-218:1.1: (209) "Bhikkhus, the foremost of my bhikkhu disciples among those who desire the training is Rāhula."
an1.209-218:1.2: (210) " … among those who have gone forth out of faith is Raṭṭhapāla."
an1.209-218:1.3: (211) " … among those who are first to take meal tickets is Kuṇḍadhāna."
an1.209-218:1.4: (212) " … among those who compose inspired verse is Vangīsa."
an1.209-218:1.5: (213) " … among those who inspire confidence in all respects is Upasena Vangantaputta."
an1.209-218:1.6: (214) " … among those who assign lodgings is Dabba Mallaputta."
an1.209-218:1.7: (215) " … among those pleasing and agreeable to the deities is Piḷindavaccha."
an1.209-218:1.8: (216) " … among those who quickly attain direct knowledge is Bāhiya Dārucīriya."
an1.209-218:1.9: (217) " … among those with variegated speech is Kumārakassapa."
an1.209-218:1.10: (218) " … among those who have attained the analytical knowledges is Mahākoṭṭhita."
